chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 510 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.2376/2022 20.01.2023 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Through instant application, the applicant/surety, namely, Seengar S/o Ghulam Akbar Jamro, seeks return of his surety document furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears from the record that accused, namely, Nisar Ahmed Solangi, was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 07.09.2018, which was ultimately confirmed vide order dated 22.02.2019, whereas, the applicant had stood surety on behalf of the said accused person by depositing original Defence Savings Certificate No. JB-430641 amounting to Rs.50,000/-. After the grant of pre-arrest bail, the accused person regularly attended the concerned trial Court i.e. Additional Sessions Judge-IV, Khairpur and ultimately he has been acquitted by way of compromise vide order dated 07.04.2022 in Sessions Case No.664 of 2018 (Re: The State v. Asghar Ali Solangi and others), arising out of Crime No.93 of 2018, registered at Police Station Kumb, District Khairpur under Sections 324, 337-H, 337-F(iii), 148, 149, P.P.C. In this regard, the applicant has placed on record certified true copy of aforesaid order. Learned Additional P.G. for the State records no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 31.05.2022. In view of above, the listed application is allowed.

The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 31.05.2022. In view of above, the listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document as furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court to the applicant/surety after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
